message:
fix(abi): migrate stdio_abi.rs syscalls (partial)

Migrate 16 libc::syscall calls to raw syscall wrappers:
- fopen_native: openat, close
- fdopen_native_impl: lseek
- fclose_native: close
- fseek_native: lseek
- fdopen: fcntl
- freopen: openat, dup2, close
- remove: unlinkat
- tmpfile: unlinkat, close
- tmpnam: getpid

26 calls remaining in popen implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
